Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has tankiness and CC early. Play safe, use W poke.
Swain.mid_game: Roam with ult. Use gold card for picks.
Swain.late_game: You outscale with itemization and roams.
Swain.win_condition: Get roaming lead before Swain becomes unkillable.
Swain.scaling: Twisted Fate outscales — your roam impact grows
Swain.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion has tankiness and all-in. Play safe with W poke.
Sion.early_game: Play very safe. Sion dominates early.
Sion.mid_game: Roam with ult. Use gold card for picks.
Sion.late_game: He becomes tanky. Use your roams.
Sion.scaling: Sion outscales — his tankiness increases late
Sion.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Aurelion Sol.trading_pattern: Aurelion Sol pushes and roams better early. Farm defensively.
Aurelion Sol.ability_to_dodge: Aurelion Sol W (Expansion) — stay at range.
Aurelion Sol.early_game: Farm defensively. Aurelion Sol roams better early.
Aurelion Sol.mid_game: Both roam. Coordinate roams for picks.
Aurelion Sol.late_game: He outscales in roaming. Win through map control.
Aurelion Sol.scaling: Aurelion Sol slightly favored — his roaming is stronger
Aurelion Sol.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Naafiri.trading_pattern: Naafiri has early burst. Play defensive with W poke.
Naafiri.mid_game: Roam with ult before she gets kills.
Naafiri.scaling: Twisted Fate outscales — your roaming improves late
Naafiri.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Fizz.trading_pattern: Fizz is melee with burst. Keep distance with W poke.
Fizz.ability_to_dodge: Fizz R (Chum) — move away from shark.
Fizz.early_game: Play very safe. Fizz has strong all-in.
Fizz.mid_game: Roam when he's farming. Make picks.
Fizz.scaling: Twisted Fate outscales — your roaming improves late
Fizz.positioning: Keep maximum distance. Use ult to roam.

Twitch.trading_pattern: Twitch has poke from distance. Farm defensively with W.
Twitch.early_game: Play defensively. Twitch has good poke.
Twitch.win_condition: Roam and make picks before he scales.
Twitch.scaling: Twitch slightly favored — his poke and roam are good
Twitch.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Morgana.positioning: Keep distance with W. Use ult to roam.

Akali.scaling: Twisted Fate outscales — your roaming improves late
Akali.positioning: Keep distance. Use ult to roam.

Ziggs.trading_pattern: Ziggs is weak early. Use W to poke and roam.
Ziggs.early_game: Abuse with W poke. Roam early.
Ziggs.late_game: He outscales in waveclear. Finish before he controls.
Ziggs.win_condition: Get roaming lead. Finish before he scales.
Ziggs.scaling: Ziggs outscales — his waveclear is oppressive late
Ziggs.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Kai'Sa.trading_pattern: Kai'Sa is weak early. Use W poke and roam.
Kai'Sa.ability_to_dodge: Kai'Sa Q (Icathian Diver) — respects her dash.
Kai'Sa.late_game: She outscales. Finish before she scales.
Kai'Sa.win_condition: Get roaming lead. Finish before she scales.
Kai'Sa.scaling: Kai'Sa outscales — her scaling is superior
Kai'Sa.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Karma.scaling: Twisted Fate outscales — your roaming improves late
Karma.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Malphite.late_game: He becomes tanky. Finish before oppressive.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales — his tankiness increases late
Malphite.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder is very weak early. Spam W and roam.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use W poke and roam.
Azir.ability_to_dodge: Azir soldiers have limited early range.
Azir.win_condition: Roam early. Finish before Azir scales.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late
Azir.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Seraphine.trading_pattern: Seraphine has utility similar to you. Trade when abilities down.
Seraphine.ability_to_dodge: Seraphine E (Surround Sound) — dodge by stepping away.
Seraphine.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both farm similarly.
Seraphine.late_game: Both scale similarly. Roams determine outcome.
Seraphine.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Seraphine.positioning: Use W to poke. Roam frequently.

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has poke and control. Trade when ball is far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command: Attack) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both farm similarly.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Use W to poke. Keep away from her ball.

Ahri.trading_pattern: Ahri has mobility similar to you. Trade when Q down.
Ahri.ability_to_dodge: Ahri Q (Orb of Deception) — dodge by stepping sideways.
Ahri.early_game: Mirror her playstyle. Both have early roam.
Ahri.late_game: Both scale similarly. Roams determine outcome.
Ahri.scaling: Ahri slightly favored — her mobility is higher
Ahri.positioning: Use W to poke. Use ult to roam.
